---
agent: agent
description: "Brainstorm and refine a feature design through structured Socratic dialogue"
---

Read and follow the superpowers brainstorming skill. The skill file is located at:
- If cloned to default location: ~/.copilot/superpowers/skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md
- If in workspace: skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md

Read the skill file with read_file and follow the workflow exactly.

Also read the tool mapping for reference:
- ~/.copilot/superpowers/skills/using-superpowers/references/copilot-tools.md

Use manage_todo_list for task tracking (replaces TodoWrite).
Use runSubagent if subagent dispatch is needed (replaces Task).

Start the brainstorming workflow now with the user.
